item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: In Finland, unlike other European cultures, trivial conversation or “small talk” are almost non-existent. In this country, not only is it not encouraged, but there is not even a concept of it in the Finnish language.
item.description: ????? In Finland, unlike other European cultures, trivial conversation or “small talk” are almost non-existent. In this country, not only is it not encouraged, but there is not even a concept of it in the Finnish language. Many children, when learning English, discover this type of interaction as something expected when talking to foreigners. At social gatherings, the Finns do not feel the need to fill the silences; often, these can last for minutes without causing discomfort. This preference for silence extends to other parts of the Nordic countries, such as Trondheim or Tromsø. Finnish culture values meaningful conversations and, instead of filling each pause with empty words, they prefer calm. So, if you ever find yourself in a social situation in Finland, remember that silence is not something negative, but a space for reflection, and better to avoid starting conversations about the climate.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Canada changed its fate today
item.description: Canada is pivoting decisively away from the US, building a new partnership with Europe, and carving out its own place in the world. We would have been fine carrying on as America’s bestie, but you guys dumped us so we’re joining the European polycule. See ya! https://www.theguardian.com/world/2025/jun/23/canada-eu-defense-trump-us-allies
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: It shall be so!
item.description:
So I have “verbal” confirmation that @TinyOctopus is going to adopt Frank!!
I am absolutely titillated that this is going to happen! Not only will Frank be going to an amazing forever home, but we will get to watch this little bugger grow up in the home of an Imgurian legend!! AND I will get to meet Tiny face-to-face!! It couldn’t be a better situation!! @FrankTheKitten is my new favorite account!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

Egg
THE COUNCIL WILL DECIDE YOUR FATE
HELL YEAH
oh no
As someone who is 5'3, I would like to inform you that I need help getting this thing down from the shelf at the supermarket please help me it's very high up and there's no steps
O_ O
Pride was great this year
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.title: You need to cool... and to get some memes
item.description:
You have no power here
5
I have that feeling when playing any game made with Unity
Okay it's the third one but it's sorted by download and it's funny
Is happiness even reachable in the present or does it lie in the past ?
10
Please don't do that. And for the love of all that is sacred and precious comment your code like you need to explain it to a three year old
It's at least 4 stars rare
15
20. Use this one well as a reaction meme
It's a peaceful protest... For now
25. Ominous evil horse
Taxes !
30
That's it for today ! Have a good day ! And Week ! After that we'll see. Checkout my profile for other memes, or wait a week or so for more chaos. I saw a lot of dumper using signatures' pictures at the end of their memes dump. Shall I do that too ? A ping list ? Not sure how imgur works tbh. Are some of you even humans ? Are we gonna make it as a species ? Is there a character limit to comments on a picture ? If yes can I comment the entire bee movie script under a random picture ?
item.dc:creator: H4ppyMomo

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
I've always wanted a bumper sticker that said "my other car's made of Legos"
Then plugs in his apple
All this dude wanted to convey is that he knows where his boss lives and that he's completely unhinged.

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1392 (mysterious undeciphered symbols)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Love you too! Peek a boo!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: What Happened Today #144
item.description: Cruelty and lies have become the new infrastructure of government. Today saw the systematic demolition of accountability paired with the institutionalization of brutality coupled with an Iranian retaliatory attack on one of our air bases. The Supreme Court didn't accidentally bless overseas torture camps. Republicans didn't randomly gut the GAO. These are deliberate choices to rebuild governance around inflicting pain and escaping consequences. Democracy doesn't survive when violence becomes policy and truth becomes optional. Every institution that still catches these lies or blocks this cruelty is under attack. Call your representatives now and demand they defend what's left before cruelty becomes so routine we stop noticing. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Breaking - Trump says Israel & Iran both violated ceasefire overnight 1. https://go.govbrief.today/ceasefire-confirmed 2. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-attacks-us-base 3. https://go.govbrief.today/cassidy-acip-delay 4. https://go.govbrief.today/58m-acres-logging 5. https://go.govbrief.today/lamberth-voa-answers 6. https://go.govbrief.today/senate-force-usps-sale 7. https://go.govbrief.today/parliamentarian-blocks-multiple-provisions 8. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-third-country-deportations 9. https://go.govbrief.today/house-cut-gao 10. https://go.govbrief.today/house-bans-whatsapp 11. https://go.govbrief.today/alligator-alcatraz-starts 12. https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-beats-man 13. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-wins-prelim-injunction 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-iran-disinformation 15. https://go.govbrief.today/media-matters-sues-ftc 16. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-statue-garden-sd Yesterday's Top - https://go.govbrief.today/gop-financial-engineering Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/pakistan-condemns-trump Free, Private GovBrief in Email - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
